name: GOLFTEC Lee's Summit
address: 340 SW Blue Pkwy #340, Lee's Summit, MO 64063
about: GOLFTEC Lee's Summit is a golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. The facility uses advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors to provide detailed swing analysis and personalized coaching. Lessons are available for golfers of all skill levels, with structured programs designed for beginners through experienced players. The studio also offers club fitting services, claiming customers gain an average of 21 more yards off the tee after a fitting session.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced OPTIMOTION technology provides precise swing feedback
PGA-certified coaches deliver personalized instruction plans
Data-driven fitting process increases driving distance significantly
Indoor simulator bays allow for practice in any weather
Comprehensive improvement journey from initial evaluation to on-course play

food_and_drink.notes: No food or drink service mentioned on website
No alcohol service mentioned on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, but you can also bring your own equipment if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no food or drink service at the facility, and no mention of whether outside food or drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole simulator session can vary based on the player's pace and whether it's practice or a structured lesson.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth golfers with age-appropriate instruction using their technology.
